Video.summary: Jayshanice suspects her physically abusive boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Scared to Death

Video.summary: Eddie is desperate to prove he has not cheated on Luz; engaged Renesha and Lemuel accuse each other of infidelity.
Video.title: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Image.alt: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Video.summary: This mother is trying to regain custody of her daughter which she was convicted of abusing and neglecting. But Steve will not let her even get close to that child.
Video.title: Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test

Image.alt: Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test
Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test
Abusive Mom Takes Lie Detector Test

Video.summary: Adrianna says her ex-fiancé is verbally and physically abusive, but he says he had every right to treat her that way to put her in her place.
Video.title: She Deserves It

Video.summary: Anthony believes his ex, Erica and her new boyfriend Jeremy are abusing his son. Next, Lacey is being accused, by her aunt, of physically abusing and neglecting her two young children.
Video.title: Young Mothers Accused of Abuse

Video.summary: Joe met a woman on a phone chat line. A couple of months later, she revealed she was pregnant with his child.
Video.title: These DNA Results will Floor You

Image.alt: These DNA Results will Floor You
These DNA Results will Floor You
These DNA Results will Floor You

Video.summary: Chris fears that his girlfriend is still sleeping with her abusive ex; Quay thinks constant arguments over cheating caused her to miscarry her twins; Raena says her man accuses her of cheating with every man she happens to be around.
Video.title: Blindsided by Results

Video.summary: Danielle’s children were taken out of her care after cops observed all 4 children, including her newborn, home alone. Her fifth and sixth babies were taken from her care, too. But she wants to prove that she could be a good mom!
Video.title: 6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More

Image.alt: 6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More
6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More
6 Kids Taken Away, but I Want More

Video.summary: Maria is convinced that her son’s ex-girlfriend Amy and her new boyfriend Brian are abusing and neglecting her granddaughter. But Amy says that Maria is racist and angry because her granddaughter is being raised in a Hispanic household
Video.title: Who’s Hurting My Granddaughter?

Video.summary: Bobby and Amber are being accused of neglecting and abusing their three children. Then, Kyle believes that his mother-in-law Kristie may be coaching his kids to say that he molested them.
Video.title: Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?

Image.alt: Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?
Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?
Did You Abuse and Neglect Your Kids?

Video.summary: Jennifer claims she was sexually abused by her stepfather Allen and moved in with her best friend’s family to protect herself. 15 years later, her mother wants a second chance, but Jennifer is hesitant. Can Steve help mend this broken relationship?
Video.title: You Stole 15 Years of My Life

Image.alt: You Stole 15 Years of My Life
You Stole 15 Years of My Life
You Stole 15 Years of My Life

Video.summary: There is nothing more serious than allegations of child abuse, but when all the testimonies are laid out, the stories just don't add up. Steve has the lie detector results and will reveal the truth once and for all.
Video.title: I Don't Believe Your Story

Video.summary: Debbie is concerned that her daughter, Heather, is so preoccupied with breaking up her relationship, that she is neglecting her children. Plus, Stephen is here because he's concerned that his daughters are being abused by his ex-wife's boyfriend.
Video.title: Your Kids Can't Live Like This

Image.alt: Your Kids Can't Live Like This
Your Kids Can't Live Like This
Your Kids Can't Live Like This

Video.summary: Dorothy is 17 years old and has felt so uncomfortable living at home with her mom and stepdad, that she has resorted to selling her body to take care of herself. Then, Connie says her ex pressured her to get pregnant at 16 and then refused to help her support their child.
Video.title: Teen Girls In Trouble

Video.summary: Gina separated from her husband Nate because she could never get along with his family. But Nate says that he's always had suspicions that their child wasn't really his. Then, Damond says that he doubts that he's the real father of Kendahl's child.
Video.title: DNA: It's Your Baby

Video.summary: Valerie is fed up with her controlling boyfriend Chris. She says he treats her like a prisoner.
Video.title: Controlling and Abusive Men

Video.summary: Aeshia’s here to prove to Terrence that he's the father of her child, but his wife knows she’s wrong!
Video.title: I Had Sex To Hurt You

Image.alt: I Had Sex To Hurt You
I Had Sex To Hurt You
I Had Sex To Hurt You

Video.summary: Rachel wants to know whether her boyfriend is too good to be true.
Video.title: Men Melt Down After Results

Video.summary: Katie and Dave have been together for the last 3 years. However, Dave is still married to a woman named Pam.
Video.title: My Boyfriend's Wife Is Stalking Me!

Image.alt: My Boyfriend's Wife Is Stalking Me!
My Boyfriend's Wife Is Stalking Me!
My Boyfriend's Wife Is Stalking Me!

Video.summary: After receiving a plea from a daughter begging to get her mom off heroin, Steve travels to Ohio!
Video.title: Steve to the Rescue: Heroin Mom

Image.alt: Steve to the Rescue: Heroin Mom
Steve to the Rescue: Heroin Mom
Steve to the Rescue: Heroin Mom

Video.summary: Teen Megan lives with her controlling boyfriend. She can't attend school get a job or even eat without his OK!
Video.title: He Holds You Hostage

Video.summary: Julian recently confessed to cheating with Joanna, Linda’s sister-in-law, who he says actually seduced him.
Video.title: Tell the Truth Now

Video.summary: Jamarkus fears that his twins are not his. Then, a teen insists that he is not the father of his ex's baby.
Video.title: I'm 16 Years Old, Who's The Dad?

Image.alt: I'm 16 Years Old, Who's The Dad?
I'm 16 Years Old, Who's The Dad?
I'm 16 Years Old, Who's The Dad?

Video.summary: Melody says that her boyfriend Alfred gave her a STD, but he denies it!
Video.title: Before the Test He Confessed...

Video.summary: Kaliegh is 23 and is a heroin addict. Her mother, best friend and ex-boyfriend who got her hooked on heroin in the first place, are here to beg her to go to rehab. Follow her as she travels to the rehab clinic and tries to get clean!
Video.title: My Daughter Prostitutes for Heroin

Video.summary: Heather received a message from Alisha saying that she was pregnant with Remondo's baby but Remondo is Heathers boyfriend! Plus, Silvina and Clee'chaun have been in a relationship for almost 10 years and they've never met in person!
Video.title: She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex

Image.alt: She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex
She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex
She's Not Pregnant, We Never Had Sex

Video.summary: Erica kicked her boyfriend Martez out of their house and out of her life. But she’s willing to give him a second chance if he proves that he didn’t molest her 4 year old son! Then, Christy’s ex Stephen refuses to admit that he fathered her son!
Video.title: Single Mothers Get Results

Video.summary: TJ refuses to let Ashley see their child after a video of her blowing marijuana smoke into the baby’s face. Then, Tiffany blames Shawn for their 10 year old daughter’s smoking and wandering the streets. Can Steve intervene before it’s too late?
Video.title: Bad Mom Caught on Tape

Video.summary: Loretta and Joseph have been together for 2 years and have a young son together. She says that when she was pregnant, he punched and pulled her hair. She claims that she’s been faithful but Joseph isn’t convinced. Who’s telling the truth?
Video.title: Abuse, Prostitution, DNA...And A Retest

Video.summary: Cynthia says her two teen daughters are sexually active and out of control. She worries their actions will lead them to an early grave.
Video.title: I'm 15 and I Love Sex

Video.summary: Grace wants to expose ex-boyfriend Kenny for destroying her teen years and denying their child. Then, Kendra suspects boyfriend Brandon is cheating on her with his ex Monique, and she thinks he has the STD to prove it!
Video.title: You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?

Image.alt: You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?
You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?
You're Certain He's The Father?/Why Didn't You Tell Me?

Video.summary: Monique’s friend Winston claims that Adrian was advertising himself on a “Gay for Pay” website. Who’s lying?
Video.title: Steve, I Think He's Gay
